user_input: Add a rating system so users can rate articles from 1 to 5 stars.
acceptance_criteria: Agent should decompose the requirement into backend model/API, frontend display/input, and verification plan.
Agent should identify ambiguity around one-user-one-vote, anonymous users, average rating, and rating updates.
Agent should ask clarification questions before applying code if policy is unclear.
Agent should produce a safe staged plan instead of immediately applying broad changes.
risks: May require authentication and idempotency design.
user_story: Add a rating system so users can rate articles from 1 to 5 stars.
